channel.title: CyberWatch Threat Intelligence
channel.description: Aggregated CVEs, advisories, incidents and IOCs

item.title: [CRITICAL] CVE-2026-59831 GitHub CLI `gh codespace jupyter` could allow remote code execution when connecting to a malicious Codespace
item.description: Information published.

item.title: [MEDIUM] Fedora: kernel-7.1.3-101.fc43 (FEDORA-2026-085c9e92a4)
item.description: The 7.1.3-101/201 builds contain an important fix for XFS filesystem users.

item.title: [MEDIUM] Fedora: kernel-7.1.3-201.fc44 (FEDORA-2026-e8e294a7fa)
item.description: The 7.1.3-101/201 builds contain an important fix for XFS filesystem users.

item.description: Update to 4.53.3

item.description: Update to 4.53.3

item.title: [MEDIUM] Fedora: spoofdpi-1.5.3-1.fc45 (FEDORA-2026-b382f3a576)
item.description: Automatic update for spoofdpi-1.5.3-1.fc45. ##### **Changelog** ``` * Tue Jul 14 2026 Emir Akdag - 1.5.3-1 - Update spoofdpi to 1.5.3 - Update to 1.5.3 to fix CVE-2026-27145 - Add missing license for go-localereader - Fix build directory case sensitivity issue - Resolves: rhbz#2494220, rhbz#2494389 ```

item.title: [MEDIUM] Fedora: firefox-152.0.6-1.fc44 (FEDORA-2026-51c2920764)
item.description: - New upstream release (152.0.6)

item.title: [MEDIUM] Fedora: ruby-4.0.6-36.fc45 (FEDORA-2026-7f499e0362)
item.description: Ruby 4.0.6 is released.

item.title: [HIGH] PoC released: CVE-2025-32044
item.description: CVE-2025-32044 — Moodle 4.5.0-4.5.2 Unauthenticated REST API User Data Exposure via Stack Trace Args Leak | CVSS 7.5

item.title: [CRITICAL] PoC released: CVE-2026-58138
item.description: CVE-2026-58138 — Conductor (3.21.21..<3.30.2) unauthenticated RCE via INLINE GraalVM evaluator (HostAccess.ALL). Lab + PoC, verified e2e (root).

item.title: [HIGH] PoC released: CVE-2026-46591
item.description: Reproducer for CVE-2026-46591: Apache Camel camel-neo4j Cypher injection via property names in CamelNeo4jMatchProperties, enabling authorization bypass / cross-label data exfiltration (fixed in 4.14.8/4.18.3/4.21.0)

item.title: [CRITICAL] PoC released: CVE-2026-13001
item.description: Podlove Podcast Publisher Unauthenticated File Upload RCE via is_image() vs extract_file_extension() Mismatch | CVSS 9.8

item.title: [CRITICAL] PoC released: CVE-2026-3891
item.description: Pix for WooCommerce Unauthenticated File Upload via certificate_crt_path Parameter | CVSS 9.8

item.title: [HIGH] PoC released: CVE-2024-6387
item.description: A lightweight, fast tool to scan and detect the "regreSSHion" OpenSSH remote code execution vulnerability (CVE-2024-6387).

item.title: [HIGH] PoC released: CVE-2026-48909
item.description: CVE-2026-48909 - Unauthenticated PHP Object Injection to RCE exploit for Joomla SP LMS extension versions <= 4.1.3. Exploits lmsOrders cookie deserialization to write webshell via Joomla FormattedtextLogger gadget chain. Includes interactive shell, path discovery, and cleanup. For authorized security testing only.

item.title: [MEDIUM] PoC released: CVE-2026-21045
item.description: Samsung libimagecodec.quram.so OOB Write PoC

item.title: [HIGH] Ransomware: AiLock claims Ferrovial
item.description: Ransomware group 'AiLock' claimed victim: Ferrovial. Country: ES. Sector: Construction.

item.description: Ransomware group 'AiLock' claimed victim: Solid Advance Inc.. Country: JP. Sector: Business Services.

item.description: Ransomware group 'AiLock' claimed victim: Nihon Kotsu Co., Ltd.. Country: JP. Sector: Transportation/Logistics.

item.title: [MEDIUM] Arch Linux: Arch Issue
item.description: Type: | Severity: Unknown | Package:

item.title: [MEDIUM] VMware: VMSA-2026-0004: VMware Cloud Foundation Operations updates address multiple vulnerabilities (CVE-2026-41722, CVE-2026-41723 and CVE-2026-41724)
[CRITICAL] CVE-2026-14807: ERP App developed by PROG MIS has a Use of Hard-coded Credentials vulnerability,...
item.description: ERP App developed by PROG MIS has a Use of Hard-coded Credentials vulnerability, allowing unauthenticated remote attackers to log in to view application code and obtain the database account and password.

item.title: [MEDIUM] CVE-2026-14802: A vulnerability was detected in react create-react-app up to 5.0.1 on macOS. Thi...
item.description: A vulnerability was detected in react create-react-app up to 5.0.1 on macOS. This affects the function startBrowserProcess of the file openBrowser.js of the component react-dev-utils. Performing a manipulation results in os command injection. Remote exploitation of the attack is possible. The exploit is now public and may be used. The project was informed of the problem early through an issue repo

item.title: [MEDIUM] CVE-2026-14801: A security vulnerability has been detected in GPAC 26.03-DEV-rev342-g80071f700-m...
item.description: A security vulnerability has been detected in GPAC 26.03-DEV-rev342-g80071f700-master. The impacted element is the function txtin_probe_duration of the file src/filters/load_text.c of the component TeXML File Handler. Such manipulation of the argument txml_timescale leads to divide by zero. An attack has to be approached locally. The name of the patch is 86a5191f2e750c767253e27ed6cfd6d547afebc2. A

item.title: [CRITICAL] CVE-2026-14800: A weakness has been identified in imhamzaazam ecommerceFlask up to cb7d9e24c30a9...
item.description: A weakness has been identified in imhamzaazam ecommerceFlask up to cb7d9e24c30a99379651b7493b32048126ef402b. The affected element is an unknown function. This manipulation causes cross-site request forgery. The attack may be initiated remotely. The exploit has been made available to the public and could be used for attacks. This product uses a rolling release model to deliver continuous updates. A

item.title: [CRITICAL] CVE-2026-12083: The Admin and Site Enhancements (ASE) WordPress plugin before 8.8.4, admin-site-...
item.description: The Admin and Site Enhancements (ASE) WordPress plugin before 8.8.4, admin-site-enhancements-pro WordPress plugin before 8.8.4 does not perform authentication, authorization, or nonce checks on a role-restoration request handler, allowing unauthenticated attackers to restore a previously demoted administrator account back to the administrator role. This is an incomplete fix of CVE-2024-43333 / CVE

item.title: [CRITICAL] CVE-2026-11962: The FileOrganizer WordPress plugin before 1.2.0 does not validate the file type...
item.description: The FileOrganizer WordPress plugin before 1.2.0 does not validate the file type on several of its file-management operations, allowing authenticated users who have been granted file-manager access — which its premium add-on can extend to sub-administrator roles — to upload arbitrary PHP files and achieve remote code execution. This is an incomplete fix of CVE-2024-7985, which only added file-type

item.title: [CRITICAL] CVE-2026-11855: The Simple Membership WordPress plugin before 4.7.5 does not verify the authenti...
item.description: The Simple Membership WordPress plugin before 4.7.5 does not verify the authenticity of Stripe webhook requests when no signing secret is configured, nor escape a value taken from them before outputting it in an administrator notice, allowing unauthenticated attackers to inject arbitrary web scripts that execute in the context of a logged-in administrator.

item.title: [LOW] CVE-2026-11766: The Ultimate Member WordPress plugin before 2.12.0 does not properly sanitise a...
item.description: The Ultimate Member WordPress plugin before 2.12.0 does not properly sanitise and escape the value of custom textarea profile fields before outputting it on user profiles, allowing authenticated users with Subscriber-level access and above to store JavaScript that executes when any user, including an administrator, views the affected profile.

item.title: [CRITICAL] CVE-2026-10830: The AllCoach WordPress plugin before 1.0.2 does not verify that an email addres...
item.description: The AllCoach WordPress plugin before 1.0.2 does not verify that an email address submitted to a public account-registration endpoint is not already associated with an existing user before overwriting that user's password, allowing unauthenticated attackers to reset the password of arbitrary accounts, including administrators, and take over the site.

item.title: [LOW] CVE-2024-6228: The Notifications for Forms & WordPress Actions WordPress plugin before 2.6 does...
item.description: The Notifications for Forms & WordPress Actions WordPress plugin before 2.6 does not validate a user-supplied value before using it to build a server-side file inclusion path, allowing authenticated users with subscriber-level access and above to include and execute arbitrary local PHP files on the server.

item.title: [MEDIUM] Police Disrupt a €140M Cyber Fraud Ring in Spain
item.description: Iberian hackers carried out a variety of cyberattacks and laundered the winnings through complex financial networks.

item.title: [CRITICAL] Nightmare Eclipse Drops ‘LegacyHive’ Windows Zero-Day
item.description: The researcher stripped the proof-of-concept (PoC) exploit to prevent immediate exploitation of the vulnerability. The post Nightmare Eclipse Drops ‘LegacyHive’ Windows Zero-Day appeared first on SecurityWeek.

item.title: [MEDIUM] ASUS bsitf.sys (CVE-2026-13585): Arbitrary Physical Memory Mapping via Unvalidated IOCTL
item.description: CVE here: https://www.cve.org/CVERecord?id=CVE-2026-13585   submitted by   /u/watchdogsrox [link]   [comments]

item.title: [CRITICAL] Trend Micro, Tanium, ESET and Tenable Patch Severe Product Vulnerabilities
item.description: The cybersecurity companies patched critical and high-severity vulnerabilities in some of their products. The post Trend Micro, Tanium, ESET and Tenable Patch Severe Product Vulnerabilities appeared first on SecurityWeek.

item.title: [MEDIUM] ISC Stormcast For Thursday, July 16th, 2026 https://isc.sans.edu/podcastdetail/10010, (Thu, Jul 16th)
item.description: (c) SANS Internet Storm Center. https://isc.sans.edu Creative Commons Attribution-Noncommercial 3.0 United States License.

item.title: [CRITICAL] GHSA: ToolHive: SSRF in remote MCP server authentication discovery (host-side, bypasses container isolation)
item.description: # Security Advisory: SSRF in remote MCP server authentication discovery **Severity:** High. **CWE:** CWE-918. **Affected:** ToolHive through the latest release v0.29.3 and current `main` (HEAD b672d82f, 2026-06-12; re-verified 2026-06-14). `FetchResourceMetadata` and the discovery clients remain unguarded; no commits to `pkg/auth/discovery` or `pkg/auth/remote` address this. Originally identified

item.title: [CRITICAL] GHSA: adawolfa/isdoc: Uncontrolled resource consumption (decompression bomb) when reading untrusted ISDOCX or PDF files
item.description: ### Impact `adawolfa/isdoc` reads ISDOC invoices from ISDOCX (ZIP) archives and from PDF files with embedded ISDOC documents and supplements. Affected versions inflate ZIP entries and read embedded files **without validating their uncompressed size**, so a small crafted file can amplify into gigabytes: - **ISDOCX decompression bomb** — `getFromName()` inflates the ISDOC document and binary supplem

item.title: [MEDIUM] GHSA: @andrea9293/mcp-documentation-server: Web UI API binds to all interfaces without authentication by default
item.description: ### Summary `@andrea9293/mcp-documentation-server` v1.13.0 documents that a Web UI starts automatically on port `3080`. However, the Web UI/API appears to bind to all network interfaces by default (`*:3080` / `0.0.0.0:3080`) instead of localhost-only, and its document-management API endpoints do not require authentication. As a result, any network-reachable client on the same LAN, VM network, or c

item.title: [CRITICAL] GHSA: systeminformation: OS command injection in networkInterfaces() via interfaces(5) source-directive path on Linux
item.description: ### Summary On Linux, `systeminformation`'s `networkInterfaces()` is vulnerable to OS command injection through the Debian/Ubuntu `interfaces(5)` `source` directive. While collecting per-interface DHCP state, the library reads `/etc/network/interfaces` and, for every `source ` line it encounters, extracts the path token *from the file content* and interpolates it **unquoted** into a shell command

item.title: [LOW] GHSA: Pomerium Pre-Auth Memory Exhaustion via Unbounded zstd Decompression in HPKE Callback
item.description: ## Summary The HPKE V2 URL decode path in `pkg/hpke/url.go` decompresses attacker-controlled zstd data without any size limit. On Pomerium deployments using the stateless authentication flow (Pomerium Zero / hosted authenticate), the proxy's `/.pomerium/callback` endpoint is reachable without credentials and processes attacker-crafted HPKE-encrypted payloads before the sender's identity is validat

item.title: [CRITICAL] GHSA: dd-trace-rb: Improper parsing of W3C baggage headers may lead to DoS
item.description: ### Impact Datadog tracing libraries that implement W3C baggage propagation parse incoming baggage HTTP headers without enforcing item-count or byte-size limits on the extract path. The DD_TRACE_BAGGAGE_MAX_ITEMS (default 64) and DD_TRACE_BAGGAGE_MAX_BYTES (default 8192) limits were applied only to baggage injection, not extraction. A remote, unauthenticated attacker can send a request whose bagga

item.title: [CRITICAL] GHSA: dd-trace-go: Improper parsing of W3C baggage headers may lead to DoS
item.description: ### Impact Datadog tracing libraries that implement W3C baggage propagation parse incoming baggage HTTP headers without enforcing item-count or byte-size limits on the extract path. The DD_TRACE_BAGGAGE_MAX_ITEMS (default 64) and DD_TRACE_BAGGAGE_MAX_BYTES (default 8192) limits were applied only to baggage injection, not extraction. A remote, unauthenticated attacker can send a request whose bagga
